title: The Party Crashers
writer: William Alland, Bernard Girard, Dan Lundberg
actors: Connie Stevens, Bobby Driscoll, Mark Damon
plot: An unruly teenage gang led by Mark Damon gets their kicks by crashing square teen parties around town. At an innocent teen gathering, Damon charms rich spoiled brat Connie Stevens into accompanying him to a motel party and she dra...
